era_resolution: International intervention led to the establishment of the Mount Lebanon Mutasarrifate, a semi-autonomous region under Ottoman rule
modern_resolution: Implementation of advanced socio-economic frameworks, focusing on inclusive governance, digital infrastructure, and sustainable development to mitigate sectarian divisions and enhance national cohesion

biblical_tie.context: Pray for the peace of Jerusalem: 'May those who love you be secure.'

protocol: UESP Apex Protocol 4278-7319: Implementing inclusive governance and digital infrastructure to enhance systemic integrity and mitigate societal friction
